data.name: Application.ProductName.Format
data.comment: {0} is Application.ProductName.Bare. {1} is the version number (e.g., "2.6"). {2} is either an empty string, or a version tag constructed with Application.ProductNage.Format (e.g., "Beta 5")

data.name: Application.ProductName.Tag.Format
data.comment: {0} is the version tag, e.g. Beta 5

data.name: CanvasSizeAction.ResizeDocument.OutOfMemory
data.value: Not enough memory to resize the canvas.

data.name: CanvasSizeDialog.NewSpaceLabel.Text
data.value: The new space will be filled with the currently selected background color.

data.name: CloneStampTool.HelpText
data.value: Hold Ctrl and left click to select an origin. Afterwards, left click and draw to copy

data.name: ColorPickerTool.HelpText
data.value: Left click to set primary color, right click to set secondary color

data.name: CommonAction.CheckForUpdates
data.value: An update is available. Click for more information.

data.name: DocumentWorkspace.LayerPropertyChangingHandler.HistoryActionNameFormat
data.comment: {0} represents the layer index

data.name: DocumentWorkspace.InitializeEffects.DllLoadFailed.Format
data.value: There was an error loading {0}. It may be corrupt, or it may need to be recompiled.
data.comment: {0} is a file name

data.name: DocumentWorkspace.NewLayerButtonClicked.OutOfMemory
data.value: Not enough memory to create the layer.

data.name: DocumentWorkspace.NewLayerName.Format
data.comment: {0} is the number of the new layer

data.name: DocumentWorkspace.DeleteLayerButtonClicked.MustHaveOneLayer
data.value: There must be at least one layer in an image.

data.name: DocumentWorkspace.DuplicateLayerButtonClicked.OutOfMemory
data.value: Not enough memory to duplicate layer.

data.name: EllipseSelectTool.HelpText
data.value: Left button: Replace. Ctrl+Left: Add. Right: Subtract. Ctrl+Right: Invert. Hold shift: Constrain to circle.

data.name: EllipseTool.HelpText
data.value: Click and drag to draw an ellipse (right click for background color). Hold shift to constrain to a circle.

data.name: EraserTool.HelpText
data.value: Click and drag to erase a portion of the image

data.name: FreeformShapeTool.HelpText
data.value: Left click to draw a freeform shape with the primary color, right click to use the secondary color

data.name: ImportFromFileAction.AskForCanvasResize.Confirmation
data.value: The image being imported is larger than the image canvas. Expand canvas to fit imported image?

data.name: ImportFromFileAction.AskForCanvasResize.OutOfMemory
data.value: Ran out of memory while trying to resize the image.

data.name: ImportFromFileAction.ImportOneLayer.OutOfMemory
data.value: Ran out of memory while trying to resize the layer.

data.name: ImportFromFileAction.ImportOneFile.NewLayer.Format
data.comment: {0} is the file being imported, {1} is the name of a layer within that file

data.name: LassoSelectTool.HelpText
data.value: Left button: Replace. Ctrl+Left: Add. Right: Subtract. Ctrl+Right: Invert.

data.name: LineTool.HelpText
data.value: Left click to draw with primary color, right click to use secondary color

data.name: LineTool.PreCurveHelpText
data.value: Drag nubs to curve line (right button for Bezier), or press Enter to finish line, or draw elsewhere for a new line.

data.name: LineTool.CurvingHelpText
data.value: Press Enter to finish the curve, or draw elsewhere for a new line. Tap Ctrl to toggle nubs.

data.name: MagicWandTool.HelpText
data.value: Click to select an area of similar color. Hold Shift to add (union), Ctrl to xor, or Ctrl+Shift to remove.

data.name: MoveTool.HelpText
data.value: Drag the selection to move. Drag the nubs to scale. Drag with right mouse button to rotate.

data.name: MoveSelectionTool.HelpText
data.value: Drag the selection to move. Drag the nubs to scale. Drag with right mouse button to rotate.

data.name: PaintBrushTool.HelpText
data.value: Left click to draw with primary color, right click to draw with secondary color

data.name: PaintBucketTool.HelpText
data.value: Left click to fill a region with the primary color, right click to fill with the secondary color

data.name: PanTool.HelpText
data.value: When zoomed in close, click and drag to navigate the image

data.name: PdnInfo.FullAppName.Format
data.comment: {0} is the product name ("Paint.NET"), {1} is the version string ("2.2.2000.3000")

data.name: PdnInfo.VersionString.Format
data.comment: {0} is the friendly version name (configuration name), such as "Beta 2" or "Final". {1} is Debug or Release. {2} is the product version.

data.name: PdnInfo.FriendlyVersionString.Format
data.comment: {0} is the version, such as "2.5". {1} is the configuration ("Beta 5") formatted via PdnInfo.FriendlyVersionString.ConfigWithSpace.Format, or it is an empty string if the configuration is "Final"

data.name: PencilTool.HelpText
data.value: Left click to draw freeform, one-pixel wide lines with the primary color, right click to use the secondary color

data.name: ProgressDialog.PercentText.Text.Format
data.comment: {0} is a number from 0 to 100

data.name: RecolorTool.HelpText
data.value: Left click to replace the secondary color with the primary color.

data.name: RectangleSelectTool.HelpText
data.value: Left button: Replace. Ctrl+Left: Add. Right: Subtract. Ctrl+Right: Invert. Hold shift: Constrain to square.

data.name: RectangleTool.HelpText
data.value: Click and drag to draw a rectangle (right click for background color). Hold shift to constrain to a square.

data.name: ResizeAction.PerformAction.UnspecifiedError
data.value: There was an unspecified error while trying to resize the image.

data.name: ResizeAction.PerformAction.OutOfMemory
data.value: Not enough memory to resize the image.

data.name: ResizeDialog.ResizedImageHeader.Text.Format
data.comment: {0} is a byte size, such as 3.8mb

data.name: RotateAction.HistoryActionName.Format
data.comment: {0} is the action name ("Rotate"), {1} is the angle (90 CW)

data.name: RoundedRectangleTool.HelpText
data.value: Click and drag to draw a rounded rectangle (right click for background color). Hold shift to constrain.

data.name: SaveConfigDialog.FileSizeText.Text.Format
data.comment: {0} is a file size, or some text in parenthesis (such as SaveConfigDialog.FileSizeText.Text.Error)

data.name: SaveConfigDialog.FileSizeText.Text.Computing.Format
data.comment: {0} is a number between 0 and 100

data.name: Startup.UnhandledError.Format
data.value: There was an unhandled error, and Paint.NET must be closed. Refer to the file '{0}', which has been placed on your desktop, for more information.
data.comment: {0} is a filename

data.name: TextConfigWidget.Error.TooSmall.Format
data.comment: {0} is an integer

data.name: TextConfigWidget.Error.TooLarge.Format
data.comment: {0} is an integer

data.name: TextTool.HelpText
data.value: Left click to place the text cursor, and then type to enter text. Text is drawn with the primary color.

data.name: TextTool.StatusText.StartTyping
data.value: Drag the nub to move the text. Hold Ctrl to hide nub and cursor. Tap Ctrl to toggle nub.

data.name: ToleranceSliderControl.Percentage.Format
data.comment: {0} is an integer

data.name: ZoomTool.HelpText
data.value: Left click to zoom in, right click to zoom out, middle click to slide

data.name: ZoomConfigWidget.Error.TooSmall
data.value: Zoom has to be at least 1%

data.name: ZoomConfigWidget.Percentage.Format
data.comment: {0} is an integer

data.name: MainForm.StatusBar.Context.Help.Text.Format
data.comment: {0} is the tool's name, {1} is its help text

data.name: MainForm.AskForSave
data.value: Do you want to save changes to {0}?
data.comment: {0} is a filename, e.g. "Untitled.png"

data.name: AcquireImageAction.Error.Clipboard.NoAcquirableImage
data.value: There is no acquirable image in the clipboard.

data.name: AcquireImageAction.Error.Clipboard.TransferError
data.value: There was an error transferring the image from the clipboard.

data.name: AcquireImageAction.Error.Clipboard.OutOfMemory
data.value: Not enough memory to copy the image from the clipboard.

data.name: MainForm.StatusBar.Size.Format
data.comment: {0} is width, {1} is units (e.g. cm or px), {2} is height, {3} is units

data.name: MainForm.Text.Format.Normal
data.comment: {0} is friendly document name, {1} is zoom level, {2} is application name

data.name: MainForm.Text.Format.ExpiryIncluded
data.comment: {0} is the title string composed from MainForm.Text.Format.Normal, {1} is a date string

data.name: MainForm.Text.Format.Minimized
data.comment: {0} is friendly document name, {1} is application name

data.name: NewImageAction.Error.OutOfMemory
data.value: Not enough memory to create new image.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.ImageTypeNotRecognized
data.value: The image type is not recognized, and cannot be opened.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.ArgumentException
data.value: There was an error opening the file.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.UnauthorizedAccessException
data.value: Access was denied to the requested file (unauthorized access).

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.SecurityException
data.value: Access was denied to the requested file (security exception).

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.FileNotFoundException
data.value: The file could not be found.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.DirectoryNotFoundException
data.value: The directory could not be found.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.PathTooLongException
data.value: The file name is too long.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.IOException
data.value: There was an error reading the file from the media.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.SerializationException
data.value: The file is corrupt or was saved with a newer version of Paint.NET.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.OutOfMemoryException
data.value: Not enough memory to load the image.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Error.Exception
data.value: There was an unspecified error while opening the file.

data.name: MainForm.LoadDocument.Warning.SavedWithOlderVersion.Format
data.comment: {0} and {1} are version numbers

data.name: MainForm.WarnAboutFlattening.Text
data.value: Saving in this file format will "flatten" the image, discarding all layering information and hidden layers. Proceed?

data.name: MainForm.SaveDocument.Error.UnauthorizedAccessException
data.value: Access is denied. Use File->Save As... to save under a different location or name.

data.name: MainForm.SaveDocument.Error.SecurityException
data.value: Access is denied. Use File->Save As... to save under a different location or name.

data.name: MainForm.SaveDocument.Error.DirectoryNotFoundException
data.value: The directory could not be found. Use File->Save As... to save to another location.

data.name: MainForm.SaveDocument.Error.IOException
data.value: An I/O error occurred when writing to the file.

data.name: MainForm.SaveDocument.Error.OutOfMemoryException
data.value: Not enough memory to save the image.

data.name: MainForm.SaveDocument.Error.Exception
data.value: There was an unspecified error while saving the file.

data.name: CopyAction.Error.TransferToClipboard
data.value: There was an error copying the image to the clipboard.

data.name: CopyAction.Error.OutOfMemory
data.value: Not enough memory to complete the clipboard operation.

data.name: MainForm.Effects.RepeatMenuItem.Format
data.comment: {0} is the effect name

data.name: MainForm.Effects.Name.Format.Configurable
data.comment: {0} is the effect name

data.name: PasteAction.Error.TransferFromClipboard
data.value: There was an error transferring the image from the clipboard.

data.name: PasteAction.Error.OutOfMemory
data.value: Not enough memory to perform Paste.

data.name: PasteAction.Error.NotRecognized
data.value: The image in the clipboard couldn't be recognized. Try re-copying it with the original application that was used to acquire it.

data.name: PasteAction.Error.NoImage
data.value: The clipboard doesn't contain an image.

data.name: PasteAction.Question.ExpandCanvas
data.value: The image being pasted is larger than the image canvas. Expand canvas to fit pasted image?

data.name: NewLayerAction.Error.OutOfMemory
data.value: Not enough memory to create a new layer.

data.name: MainForm.StatusBar.Progress.Percentage.Format
data.comment: {0} is an integer

data.name: MainForm.StatusBar.Context.SelectedArea.Text.Format
data.comment: {0} is width, {1} is units abbreviation, {2} is height, {3} is units abbreviation, {4} is the area, {5} is plural units (pixels, inches)

data.name: MainForm.StatusBar.Context.SelectedArea.Text.WithAngle.Format
data.comment: {0} is width, {1} is units abbreviation, {2} is height, {3} is units abbreviation, {4} is the area, {5} is plural units (pixels, inches), {6} is angle of rotation

data.name: WIA.Error.EnableMe
data.value: To use this feature you must enable the Windows Image Acquisition system service.

data.name: WIA.Error.RequiresXPSP1
data.value: This feature requires Windows XP SP1 or later.

data.name: WIA.Error.UnableToLoad
data.value: The Windows Image Acquisition (WIA) library, "wiaaut.dll" is unavailable. Please read the Help file (Help menu -> Help Topics), in the Frequently Asked Questions topic, for troubleshooting information.

data.name: MainForm.DragDrop.Question.Confirmation.Title
data.value: Would you like to import these files as new layers into the current image?

data.name: MainForm.DragDrop.Question.OpenOrImport.Title
data.value: What would you like to do with this file?

data.name: MainForm.DragDrop.Question.OpenOrImport.Open
data.value: Open it as a new image

data.name: MainForm.DragDrop.Question.OpenOrImport.Import
data.value: Import it as new layer(s) into the current image

data.name: SendFeedback.Email.Body
data.value: << Enter your feedback or bug report here (English or German only please). >>

data.name: ScaleFactor.Percentage.Format
data.comment: {0} is an integer

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.SwatchOutHigh.ToolTipText
data.value: Output White Point (double click to choose)

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.SwatchOutLow.ToolTipText
data.value: Output Black Point (double click to choose)

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.HistogramOutput.ToolTipText
data.value: This histogram shows a preview of the distribution of color in the resultant image

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.HistogramInput.ToolTipText
data.value: This histogram shows the distribution of color in the original image.

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.SwatchInHigh.ToolTipText
data.value: Input White Point (double click to choose)

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.SwatchInLow.ToolTipText
data.value: Input Black Point (double click to choose)

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.RedMaskCheckBox.ToolTipText
data.value: Toggle manipulation of the red channel

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.GreenMaskCheckBox.ToolTipText
data.value: Toggle manipulation of the green channel

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.BlueMaskCheckBox.ToolTipText
data.value: Toggle manipulation of the blue channel

data.name: LevelsEffectConfigDialog.AutoButton.ToolTipText
data.value: Automatically adjusts the input white point, black point, and output gamma to equalize the image

data.name: RedEyeRemoveEffectDialog.UsageHintLabel.Text
data.value: Hint: For best results, first use the selection tools to select each eye

data.name: MainForm.StatusBar.CursorInfo.Format
data.comment: {0} is x offset, {1} is units, {2} is y offset, {3} is units

data.name: UpdatesDialog.InfoLabel.Text
data.value: A newer version of Paint.NET is available. You may click the Install button to download and install it, or you may click Close to be reminded again in several days.

data.name: UpdatesDialog.BetaWarningLabel.Text
data.value: NOTE: This is a pre-release version (beta). It may not be stable.

data.name: CheckForUpdates.GenericError
data.value: There was an error while checking for updates. Please try again later.

data.name: CheckForUpdates.MustClosePdn
data.value:
Paint.NET must close to install the update. If you have other copies of Paint.NET open, you will have to close them as well.
Press OK to close this copy of Paint.NET. You will be asked to save your changes if necessary.

data.name: ExpiredDialog.Message
data.value:
This pre-release version of Paint.NET has expired (30 days).
Click OK to go to the Paint.NET website where you may download a newer version.

data.name: DownloadAndUnzipUpdateDialog.Error.Generic
data.value: There was an error downloading and installing the new version. Please try again later with the 'File -> Updates -> Check Now...' menu command.

data.name: SetLanguage.PleaseRestartApplication
data.value: You must restart Paint.NET for this change to take effect.

data.name: ClearOpenRecentList.Dialog.Text
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear the Open Recent list?

data.name: NonAdminErrorBox.Message
data.value: You must be a system administrator to perform this action.

data.name: SetupWizard.HelpText
data.value:
Paint.NET Installer Help
Command-line options:
/skipConfig - Skips configuration of options and install directory. Uses MSI properties in the following order of precedence: 1. supplied on command-line, 2. read from HKLM\Software\Paint.NET, 3. default values. NOTE: Use of this option infers acceptance of the License Agreement. /auto - Automatic install. Infers /skipConfig. Does not show the final wizard page that details the result of installation. /createMsi - Creates MSI packages that may be used for deployment (AD/GPO) purposes. All properties specified on the command-line are merged into the MSI packages, so no further transforms are necessary. PROPERTY=VALUE - Sets an MSI property. See help file after installing for more information. You do not need to specify /saveMsi to specify properties.
Return code is 0 on success, or non-zero on failure.

data.name: SetupWizard.x86Msi.LaunchCondition.NotAllowedOn64bitOS
data.value: 32-bit MSI may not be installed on 64-bit OS.

data.name: SetupWizard.Error.Win2KRequired
data.value: Paint.NET requires Windows 2000 SP3, Windows XP SP1, Windows Server 2003, or later.

data.name: SetupWizard.Error.AdminRequired
data.value: Administrator privilege is required to install Paint.NET.

data.name: SetupWizard.CancelDialog.Message
data.value: The installation is not yet complete. Are you sure you want to exit?

data.name: SetupWizard.IntroPage.IntroText.Text.Format
data.value:
This installer will help you install {0}.
Choose the installation method you prefer, and then click Next.
data.comment: {0} is the product name.

data.name: SetupWizard.IntroPage.QuickDescription.Text
data.value: This is the recommended choice for most users. This installs using the default options, or the same options that were specified during a previous installation.

data.name: SetupWizard.IntroPage.CustomDescription.Text
data.value: Allows you to change the installation directory, and options related to file type associations and update checking.

data.name: SetupWizard.IntroPage.ExpirationWarning.Format
data.value: NOTE: This is a pre-release version of Paint.NET that will expire on {0}.
data.comment: {0} is a date.

data.name: SetupWizard.LicensePage.IntroText.Text
data.value: Please take a moment to read the license agreement now. If you accept the terms below, click "I Agree", then "Next". Otherwise click "Cancel".

data.name: SetupWizard.OptionsPage.LaunchHandlingText.Text
data.value: Use these options to configure how Paint.NET can be launched.

data.name: SetupWizard.OptionsPage.JpgPngBmpCheckBox.Text
data.value: Use it as the default image editor for JPEG, PNG, and BMP images

data.name: SetupWizard.OptionsPage.TgaCheckBox.Text
data.value: Use it as the default image editor for TGA images

data.name: SetupWizard.OptionsPage.DesktopShortcutCheckBox.Text
data.value: Create a shortcut on the Desktop

data.name: SetupWizard.OptionsPage.UpdatesText.Text
data.value: Paint.NET can periodically check to see if there is a new version available and then notify you. No information is transmitted from your computer during this process. Note: You will only be notified of new versions while Paint.NET is running.

data.name: SetupWizard.InstallDirPage.IntroText.Text.Format
data.value:
The installer will install {0} to the following folder.
To install in this folder, click "Next". To install to a different folder, enter it below or click "Browse".

data.name: SetupWizard.InstallDirPage.BadDirError.Message
data.value: The specified folder could not be created. You will need to choose another folder to install to.

data.name: SetupWizard.ReadyToInstallPage.IntroText.Text.Format
data.value:
The installer is ready to install {0} on your computer.
Click "Next" to start the installation.

data.name: SetupWizard.InstallingPage.InfoText.Text.Optimizing
data.value: Optimizing performance for your system. This may take a minute.

data.name: SetupWizard.InstallingPage.InfoText.Text.Success.Format
data.value: {0} was installed successfully. Click "Finish" to close this installation wizard.

data.name: SetupWizard.InstallingPage.InfoText.Text.Success.RebootRequired.Format
data.value: {0} was installed successfully. A reboot may be required to use it properly. Click "Finish" to close this installation wizard.

data.name: SetupWizard.InstallingPage.InfoText.Text.Failure.Format
data.value: There was an error while installing {0}.

data.name: SetupWizard.CreateMsiPage.IntroText.Text.Finished
data.value: The MSI packages have been placed into the following directory: '{0}'.

data.name: Setup.DesktopShortcut.Description
data.value: Create, edit, scan, and print images and photographs.

data.name: LaunchLink.Error
data.value: There was an error launching the link.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.ConnectFailure
data.value: The remote service point could not be contacted at the transport level.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.KeepAliveFailure
data.value: The connection for a request that specifies the keep-alive header was closed unexpectedly.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.MessageLengthLimitExceeded
data.value: A message was received that exceeded the specified limit when sending a request or receiving a response from the server.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.NameResolutionFailure
data.value: The name resolver service could not resolve the host name.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.Pending
data.value: An internal asynchronous request is pending.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.PipelineFailure
data.comment: This text is different than what is in the MSDN documentation.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.ProtocolError
data.value: The response received from the server was complete but indicated a protocol-level error. For example, an HTTP protocol error such as 401 Access Denied would use this status.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.ProtocolError.Format
data.value: The server returned the following error code: HTTP {1} ({0})
data.comment: {0} is a string name from the System.Net.HttpStatusCode enumeration. {1} is an integer, such as 404

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.ProxyNameResolutionFailure
data.value: The name resolver service could not resolve the proxy host name.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.ReceiveFailure
data.value: A complete response was not received from the remote server.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.RequestCanceled
data.comment: This text is different than what is in the MSDN documentation.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.SecureChannelFailure
data.value: An error occurred in a secure channel link.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.SendFailure
data.value: An error occurred in a secure channel link.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.ServerProtocolViolation
data.value: The server response was not a valid HTTP response.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.Timeout
data.value: No response was received during the time-out period for a request.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.TrustFailure
data.value: A server certificate could not be validated.

data.name: WebExceptionStatus.UnknownError
data.value: An exception of unknown type has occurred.

data.name: CurvesEffectConfigDialog.HelpText.Text
data.value: Tip: Right-click to remove control points.
